docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENDRICKSON, DOUG DBA HENDRICKSON CONSTRUCTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA ARC METALWORKS $1,048.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,118.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
